name_en: Premium original leather M25256 White Small. This Capucines BB bag features matte Taurillon cowhide leather and metal hardware, showcasing a sharp style in a classic design. The flap offers either an external or an inward-flap style, and the neat interior features multiple pockets. Adjust the shoulder strap for a crossbody option. Dimensions: 27 × 17.3 × 9 cm
